environment: Docker Compose (linux/arm64 hub + load profile, macOS Docker Desktop host)
command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.load.yml --profile run up -d hub && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.load.yml --profile bench run --rm bench
notes: Use docker-compose.load.yml (1 publisher, ulimits, queue-capacity). Multi-publisher publish bench currently contends and under-reports hub throughput.
